    partial class MyControl
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="Items"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.DirectProperty<global::TestNs.MyControl, global::System.Collections.IEnumerable?> ItemsProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.RegisterDirect<global::TestNs.MyControl, global::System.Collections.IEnumerable?>(nameof(Items), static o => o.Items, static (o, v) => o.Items = v);

        public partial global::System.Collections.IEnumerable? Items
        {
            get => field;
            set => SetAndRaise(ItemsProperty, ref field, value);
